name: wxt-develop-skills
description: A staged Codex skills package for requirement-driven software development.

interface.shortDescription: 需求开发五阶段技能包：看懂项目、明确需求、设计方案、实现改动、验证交付
interface.longDescription: Use WXT Develop Skills to guide requirement-driven development from project understanding to delivery verification, with explicit boundaries, implementation discipline, and evidence-based completion checks.
defaultPrompt: 先看懂这个项目再开始改。
把这个需求收敛成明确边界和唯一方案。
按方案实现并在完成前验证交付。
